name: NAVEX Ethics and Compliance API
what_it_does: NAVEX REST API for integrated ethics and compliance platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve incident reports from ethics hotlines, track policy acknowledgement status, access risk and third-party due diligence data, retrieve training completions, and integrate NAVEX compliance data into HR and legal workflows. NAVEX covers EthicsPoint hotline, PolicyTech, and third-party risk management.
use_cases: Retrieving ethics hotline reports and investigation status from compliance monitoring agents
Tracking policy acknowledgement and training completion from HR compliance agents
Accessing third-party risk assessment data from vendor management agents
Integrating NAVEX compliance data into executive reporting workflow agents
not_for: Regulatory reporting to government agencies (separate submission process)
best_when: A large enterprise using NAVEX for ethics hotline, policy management, and third-party risk wants AI agents to monitor compliance program effectiveness and integrate incident data into investigation workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Ethics hotline reports often contain whistleblower information. Strict confidentiality required. Access must be limited to authorized ethics/legal personnel. Mishandling can violate whistleblower protection laws.

auth.notes: NAVEX API access through enterprise agreement. Multiple product APIs (EthicsPoint, PolicyTech, RiskRate) may have separate authentication. Contact NAVEX for API partner access.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise ethics and compliance platform with modular pricing
pricing.notes: Enterprise-only. NAVEX is used by many Fortune 500 companies. Pricing per module and employee count.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Ethics hotline data may include whistleblower reports — highest confidentiality
Whistleblower protection laws vary by jurisdiction — legal guidance required before API integration
No public MCP server — enterprise API access only
Multiple NAVEX products (EthicsPoint, PolicyTech, RiskRate) may have separate APIs
API documentation private — enterprise customers only; contact NAVEX for access
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Whistleblower and ethics hotline data requires legal-level confidentiality. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Whistleblower and ethics hotline data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Enterprise-only private API.
